body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
<!--- One sentence to describe the purpose of this PR, refer to any linked issues:
#14 -- this will link to issue 14
Closes #2 -- this will automatically close issue 2 on PR merge
-->
Works an overhaul of the neural-parameterization affiliated extensions within ClimaLand, as well as their associated dependencies. This clears the need for some bulkier dependencies in ClimaLand, replacing them with those in Base julia.
- Gets rid of BSON, swapping it for JLD2
- Gets rid of StatsBase, replacing it with (built-in) Statistics
- Gets rid of CSV and HTTP, replacing it with (built-in) Downloads
- Splits the web-scraping capability and neural model capability into two separate extensions (one called SNOTELScraperExt, the other ConstrainedNeuralModelExt), to avoid needing to load both every time only one is desired
- turns older brittle neural parameterization code into abstracted, performant module, able for usage elsewhere in ClimaLand and carrying metadata/documentation capabilities as referenced in https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaParams.jl/issues/277#issuecomment-3825244333
- Rewrites tests and tutorials accordingly (part of this is getting rid of a lot of unused functions in the Snow tutorial files like display_tools.jl and analysis_tools.jl, and recombining them into one utility file tutorial_tools.jl)
- Adds the NeuralDepthModel and NeuralAlbedoModel models (working with the new module) as Artifacts. Tests for NeuralDepthModel and NeuralSnow extension module have been updated accordingly, but tests and workflow for NeuralAlbedoModel still need to be added in (will be addressed in new PR, as this one is large enough)

title: Neural parameterization overhaul
